    post_history = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Post History:', 'desc': '${post_history}'})

    post = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Post:', 'desc': '${post}'})
